tags.name: Description
tags.value: I remember this episode - McKay had found a personal shield/force field device (the green thing on his chest) that the two were testing in a slightly reckless manner. The series already existed around 2008-2009 (which was when I watched it for the first time). One thing to note is that David Hewlett (@dhewlett) is the actor who played McKay, one who has been rather passionate about the role.

tags.name: Description
tags.value: This template resulted in some amusing responses. One thing to note is that the logo seems to have gotten a rainbow-treatment due to the ongoing pride-month - a prevalent corporate behavior (barring middle-east) that divides opinions.
